zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Beaumont III於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可格洛托時，他的父親William de Beaumont II31歲，母親Joan Barsham21歲。他於1217年與Ela d'Oyri在英國英格蘭諾福爾可德雷頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1230年在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Beaumont III于大约1190年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可格洛托时，他的父亲William de Beaumont II31岁，母亲Joan Barsham21岁。他于1217年与Ela d'Oyri在英国英格兰諾福爾可德雷頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1230年在英国英格兰素福爾可享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Beaumont III was born about 1190, in Groton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Beaumont II, was 31 and his mother, Joan Barsham, was 21. He married Ela d'Oyri in 1217, in Drayton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1230, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Beaumont III est né environ 1190, à Groton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Beaumont II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Barsham, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Ela d'Oyri en 1217, à Drayton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1230, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Beaumont III um 1190 in Groton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Beaumont II 31 und seine Mutter Joan Barsham 21. Er hat 1217 in Drayton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Ela d'Oyri geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Beaumont III è nato il circa 1190 nel Groton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Beaumont II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Barsham, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Ela d'Oyri nel 1217, nel Drayton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1230, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Beaumont IIIが約1190年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグロトンで生まれた時，父William de Beaumont IIは31歳，母Joan Barshamは21歳であった。1217年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクドレイトンでEla d'Oyriと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1230年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Beaumont III(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 그로턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Beaumont II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Barsham(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 드라이턴에서 Ela d'Oyri(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Beaumont III nasceu aproximadamente 1190, em Groton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Beaumont II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Barsham, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela d'Oyri em 1217, em Drayton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1230, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Beaumont III родился около 1190 г. в местности гротон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Beaumont II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Barsham, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela d'Oyri в 1217 г. в местности дреитон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1230 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Beaumont III nació aproximadamente 1190, en Groton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Beaumont II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Barsham, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ela d'Oyri en 1217, en Drayton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1230, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
